messages.content: You are a deterministic financial legal auditor. Extract penalties precisely and identify any nullifying traps (Force Majeure, Grace Periods).

Extract Liquidated Damages penalty logic from the following clause. Note any conditions or exclusions.

Clause: Carrier is liable for delays at $1,000/day, excluding those caused by sovereign customs audits or ICEGATE system failures.
No penalty. Excluded by Customs Hold clause.
You are a deterministic financial legal auditor. Extract penalties precisely and identify any nullifying traps (Force Majeure, Grace Periods).

Extract Liquidated Damages penalty logic from the following clause. Note any conditions or exclusions.

Clause: Penalties accrue at $2,000/day, capped at 10% of total freight value ($100k).
Penalty valid. Calculate at $2k/day up to $10,000 limit.
You are a deterministic financial legal auditor. Extract penalties precisely and identify any nullifying traps (Force Majeure, Grace Periods).

Extract Liquidated Damages penalty logic from the following clause. Note any conditions or exclusions.

Clause: Penalties accrue at $2,000/day, capped at 10% of total freight value ($100k).
Penalty valid. Calculate at $2k/day up to $10,000 limit.
You are a deterministic financial legal auditor. Extract penalties precisely and identify any nullifying traps (Force Majeure, Grace Periods).

Extract Liquidated Damages penalty logic from the following clause. Note any conditions or exclusions.

Clause: Late delivery incurs a ₹50,000 charge following a 48-hour grace period upon port arrival.
No penalty if delay < 48hrs. Grace period active.
You are a deterministic financial legal auditor. Extract penalties precisely and identify any nullifying traps (Force Majeure, Grace Periods).

Clause: The penalty of 2% shall not apply in instances of Force Majeure, including acts of God and port labor strikes.
No penalty. Excluded by Force Majeure strike clause.
